text: I was a manual tester for six years. The Playwright course rebuilt my entire mental model of testing — I automated my current company's regression suite before I even finished the course.
author: Ravi J.
title: SDET, TCS

text: The mock interviews were harder than my real ones. That's exactly why I passed on the first try. Worth every rupee.
author: Pankaj B.
title: QA Engineer, Veritas Systems

text: Coming from a non-tech background, I expected to be lost. Instead I shipped a working test framework in week 3. The mentorship made the difference.
author: Varsha D.
title: Automation Engineer, Capgemini
